calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Steven Kipperman, clerk-S. Ravinantapricha, nothing on record, department 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals and heard with case #828360.
Ira Rothken, Esq. for Appellant, Various Inc., and Witness: Carlos Magallanes and Robert Brackett.
Respondent, Daniel L. Balsam, appears in Pro Per.
Parties were sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem. Matter heard with case #838360
10:10am Opening statement by Plaintiff Daniel Balsm, Plaintiff's Trial Brief presented in open court.
10:30am Plaintiff rest, and Cross examination by Mr. Rothken.
10:35am Mr. Rothken calls Carlos Magallanes, previously sworn, as a witness for Appellant, Defendant's Trial Brief presented in open court.
Exh. A-Friend Finder Affiliate Agreement 2006-----------------------------------ID/EVID
Exh. B-Friend Finder Affiliate Agreement 2009-----------------------------------ID/EVID
Exh. C-Email chart--------------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
11:00am Defendant rest, Cross examination of Mr. Magallanes by Mr. Balsm.
11:26am Redirect by Mr. Rothken,
Exh.-D -Affiliate Suspension ---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID
11:32am Re-crossing by Mr. Balsm.
11:35am Mr. Rothken calls Robert Brackett, previously sworn, as a witness for Appellant.
11:47am Cross examination of Mr. Bracket by Mr. Balsm and Redirect by Mr. Rothken.
12:00pm Defendant rest, witness leaves the stand. The Court declared 10 minutes break.
12:10pm Closing statements by Mr. Balsm, followed by Mr. Rothken.
12:55pm Response to Defendant's closing statement by Mr. Balsm.
01:15pm Matter submitted and taken under submission.
Exhibits retained by the court.
